entry.title: New: Resolution 2026-16 (Kauaʻi) — On agenda 2026-05-13
entry.content:
Authorizing The Acquisition Of A Public Pedestrian Beach Access Easement In Land Required For Public Use To Wit: A Public Pedestrian Beach Access To ‘Aliomanu Bay, Anahola, County Of Kaua‘i, Hawai‘i, And Determining And Declaring The Necessity Of The Acquisition Thereof By Eminent Domain (For Condemnation)

Latest action: On agenda 2026-05-13

View on the council site
